speaker: PORTIA
text: I prithee, boy, run to the Senate House.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Stay not to answer me, but get thee gone.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Why dost thou stay?

speaker: LUCIUS
text: To know my errand, madam.

speaker: PORTIA
text: I would have had thee there and here again

speaker: PORTIA
text: Ere I can tell thee what thou shouldst do there.

speaker: PORTIA
PORTIA
text: Set a huge mountain ’tween my heart and tongue.

speaker: PORTIA
text: I have a man’s mind but a woman’s might.

speaker: PORTIA
text: How hard it is for women to keep counsel!—

speaker: PORTIA
text: Art thou here yet?

speaker: LUCIUS
text: Madam, what should I do?

speaker: LUCIUS
text: Run to the Capitol, and nothing else?

speaker: LUCIUS
text: And so return to you, and nothing else?

speaker: PORTIA
text: Yes, bring me word, boy, if thy lord look well,

speaker: PORTIA
text: For he went sickly forth. And take good note

speaker: PORTIA
text: What Caesar doth, what suitors press to him.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Hark, boy, what noise is that?

speaker: LUCIUS
text: I hear none, madam.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Prithee, listen well.

speaker: PORTIA
text: I heard a bustling rumor like a fray,

speaker: PORTIA
text: And the wind brings it from the Capitol.

speaker: LUCIUS
text: Sooth, madam, I hear nothing.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Come hither, fellow. Which way hast thou been?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: At mine own house, good lady.

speaker: PORTIA
text: What is ’t o’clock?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: About the ninth hour, lady.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Is Caesar yet gone to the Capitol?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Madam, not yet. I go to take my stand

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: To see him pass on to the Capitol.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Thou hast some suit to Caesar, hast thou not?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: That I have, lady. If it will please Caesar

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: To be so good to Caesar as to hear me,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: I shall beseech him to befriend himself.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Why, know’st thou any harm's intended towards him?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: None that I know will be, much that I fear may chance.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Good morrow to you.—Here the street is narrow.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: The throng that follows Caesar at the heels,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Of senators, of praetors, common suitors,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Will crowd a feeble man almost to death.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: I’ll get me to a place more void, and there

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Speak to great Caesar as he comes along.

speaker: PORTIA
text:
I must go in.
                 
                Aside
                .
               Ay me, how weak a thing

speaker: PORTIA
text: The heart of woman is! O Brutus,

speaker: PORTIA
text: The heavens speed thee in thine enterprise!

speaker: PORTIA
text:
Sure the boy heard me.
                 
                To
                 
                Lucius
                .
               Brutus hath a suit

speaker: PORTIA
text:
That Caesar will not grant.
                 
                Aside
                .
               O, I grow faint.—

speaker: PORTIA
text: Run, Lucius, and commend me to my lord.

speaker: PORTIA
text: Say I am merry. Come to me again

speaker: PORTIA
text: And bring me word what he doth say to thee.
